verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ በሎ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ እኁከ ፡ ስፋሕ ፡ በእዴከ ፡ በትረከ ፡ ዲበ ፡ አፍላግ ፡ ወዲበ ፡
                  አሥራግ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ አዕያግ ፡ ወአውፅእ ፡ ቈርነናዓተ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Say to Aaron thy brother, Stretch forth with the hand thy rod over the rivers, and over the canals, and over the pools, and bring up the frogs.
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, Go unto Pharaoh, and say unto him, Thus saith the LORD, Let my people go, that they may serve me.

verses.geez:
ወሰፍሐ ፡ አሮን ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ማያተ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወአውጽአ ፡ ቈርነናዓተ ፡ ወዐርገ ፡ ቈርነናዓት ፡ ወከደኖ ፡
                  ለምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And Aaron stretched forth his hand over the waters of Egypt, and brought up the frogs: and the frog was brought up, and covered the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And if thou refuse to let them go, behold, I will smite all thy borders with frogs:

verses.geez: ወገብሩ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ሐራስያን ፡ በሥራያቲሆሙ ፡ ወአውጽኡ ፡ ቈርነናዓተ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And the charmers of the Egyptians also did likewise with their sorceries, and brought up the frogs on the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And the river shall bring forth frogs abundantly, which shall go up and come into thine house, and into thy bedchamber, and upon thy bed, and into the house of thy servants, and upon thy people, and into thine ovens, and into thy kneadingtroughs:

verses.geez:
ወጸውዖሙ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወለአሮን ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ጸልዩ ፡ ዲቤየ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይሰስል ፡ ቈርነናዓት
                  ፡ እምኔየ ፡ ወእምሕዝብየ ፡ ወእፌንዎ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ ወይሡዑ ፡ ለእግዚእ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao called Moses and Aaron, and said, Pray for me to the Lord, and let him take away the frogs from me and from my people; and I will send them away, and they shall sacrifice to the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the frogs shall come up both on thee, and upon thy people, and upon all thy servants.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ዐድመኒ ፡ ማዕዜ ፡ እጸሊ ፡ ዲቤከ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ ዐበይትከ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ ሕዝብከ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ይማስን ፡ ቈርነናዓት ፡ እምኔከ ፡ ወእምሕዝብከ ፡ ወእምአብይቲክሙ ፡ እንበለ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ተከዚ ፡ ይተርፍ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses said to Pharao, Appoint me a time when I shall pray for thee, and for thy servants, and for thy people, to cause the frogs to disappear from thee, and from thy people, and from your houses, only in the river shall they be left behind.
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, Say unto Aaron, Stretch forth thine hand with thy rod over the streams, over the rivers, and over the ponds, and cause frogs to come up upon the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለጌሠም ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ኦሆ ፡ በከመ ፡ ትቤ ፡ ከመ ፡ ታእምር ፡ ከመ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ባዕደ ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡
                  እግዚእ ።

translations.lxx: And he said, On the morrow: he said therefore, As thou hast said; that thou mayest know, that there is no other God but the Lord.
translations.kjv: And Aaron stretched out his hand over the waters of Egypt; and the frogs came up, and covered the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወይሴስል ፡ ቈርነናዓት ፡ እምኔከ ፡ ወእምአብያቲክሙ ፡ ወእምዐበይትከ ፡ ወእምሕዝብከ ፡ እንበለ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ተከዚ ፡
                  ይተርፍ ።

translations.lxx: And the frogs shall be removed away from thee, and from your houses and from the villages, and from thy servants, and from thy people, only in the river they shall be left.
translations.kjv: And the magicians did so with their enchantments, and brought up frogs upon the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወወፅኡ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ እምኀበ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወአውየዉ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ሙስና ፡ ቈርነናዓት ፡ በከመ
                  ፡ አዘዘ ፡ ፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And Moses and Aaron went forth from Pharao, and Moses cried to the Lord concerning the restriction of the frogs, as Pharao appointed him.
translations.kjv: Then Pharaoh called for Moses and Aaron, and said, Intreat the LORD, that he may take away the frogs from me, and from my people; and I will let the people go, that they may do sacrifice unto the LORD.

verses.geez: ወገብረ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ በከመ ፡ ይቤ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወሞተ ፡ ቈርነናዓት ፡ እምአብያት ፡ ወእምአህጉር ፡ ወእምአሕቁል ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord did as Moses said, and the frogs died out of the houses, and out of the villages, and out of the fields.
translations.kjv: And Moses said unto Pharaoh, Glory over me: when shall I intreat for thee, and for thy servants, and for thy people, to destroy the frogs from thee and thy houses, that they may remain in the river only?

verses.geez: ወአስተጋብእዎ ፡ ክምረ ፡ [ክምረ] ፡ ወጼአት ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And they gathered them together in heaps, and the land stank.
translations.kjv: And he said, To morrow. And he said, Be it according to thy word: that thou mayest know that there is none like unto the LORD our God.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእየ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ከመ ፡ ኮነ ፡ ዕረፍት ፡ ከብደ ፡ ልቡ ፡ ወአበየ ፡ ሰሚዖቶሙ ፡ በከመ ፡ ነበበ ፡ እግዚእ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And when Pharao saw that there was relief, his heart was hardened, and he did not hearken to them, as the Lord spoke.
translations.kjv: And the frogs shall depart from thee, and from thy houses, and from thy servants, and from thy people; they shall remain in the river only.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ በሎ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ስፋሕ ፡ በእዴከ ፡ በትረከ ፡ ወዝብጥ ፡ መሬተ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወይወፅእ ፡
                  ጻጾት ፡ ዲበ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Say to Aaron, Stretch forth thy rod with thy hand and smite the dust of the earth; and there shall be lice both upon man, and upon quadrupeds, and in all the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And Moses and Aaron went out from Pharaoh: and Moses cried unto the LORD because of the frogs which he had brought against Pharaoh.

verses.geez:
ወሰፍሐ ፡ አሮን ፡ በእዴሁ ፡ በትሮ ፡ ወዘበጠ ፡ መሬተ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወወጽአ ፡ ጻጾት ፡ ዲበ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ እንስሳ
                  ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ መሬተ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወጽአት ፡ ጻጾት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: So Aaron stretched out his rod with his hand, and smote the dust of the earth; and the lice were on men and on quadrupeds, and in all the dust of the earth there were lice.
translations.kjv: And the LORD did according to the word of Moses; and the frogs died out of the houses, out of the villages, and out of the fields.

verses.geez:
ወገብሩ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ሐራስያን ፡ በሥራያቲሆሙ ፡ ወአውጽኡ ፡ ጻጾተ ፡ ወስእኑ ፡ ወወጽአት ፡ ጻጾት ፡ ዲበ ፡ ሰብእ ፡
                  ወዲበ ፡ እንስሳ ።

translations.lxx: And the charmers also did so with their sorceries, to bring forth the louse, and they could not. And the lice were both on the men and on the quadrupeds.
translations.kjv: And they gathered them together upon heaps: and the land stank.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ ሐራስያን ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ አጽባዕተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ወጸንዐ ፡ ልቡ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወአበየ
                  ፡ ሰሚዖቶሙ ፡ በከመ ፡ ነበበ ፡ እግዚእ ።

translations.lxx: So the charmers said to Pharao, This is the finger of God. But the heart of Pharao was hardened, and he hearkened not to them, as the Lord said.
translations.kjv: But when Pharaoh saw that there was respite, he hardened his heart, and hearkened not unto them; as the LORD had said.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ጊሥ ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ ወቁም ፡ ቅድሜሁ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ናሁ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ማይ ፡ ይወጽእ ፡ ውእቱ
                  ፡ ወበሎ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይቤ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ፈኑ ፡ ሕዝብየ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይፀመዱኒ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Rise up early in the morning, and stand before Pharao: and, behold, he will go forth to the water, and thou shalt say to him, These things says the Lord: Send away my people, that they may serve me in the wilderness.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Say unto Aaron, Stretch out thy rod, and smite the dust of the land, that it may become lice throughout all the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወእመ ፡ አበይከ ፡ ፈንዎተ ፡ ሕዝብየ ፡ ናሁ ፡ አነ ፡ እፌኑ ፡ ዲቤከ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ ዐበይትከ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ ሕዝብከ ፡ ወዲበ
                  ፡ አብያቲከ ፡ ጽንጽያ ፡ ከልብ ፡ ወይመልእ ፡ አብያተ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ጽንጽያ ፡ ከልብ ፡ ወውስተሂ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡
                  ውስቴታ ።

translations.lxx: And if thou wilt not let my people go, behold, I send upon thee, and upon thy servants, and upon thy people, and upon your houses, the dog-fly; and the houses of the Egyptians shall be filled with the dog-fly, even throughout the land upon which they are.
translations.kjv: And they did so; for Aaron stretched out his hand with his rod, and smote the dust of the earth, and it became lice in man, and in beast; all the dust of the land became lice throughout all the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወእሴባሕ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ በምድረ ፡ ጌሴም ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ሕዝብየ ፡ ወኢይሄሉ ፡ ህየ ፡ ጽንጽያ ፡
                  ከልብ ፡ ከመ ፡ ታእምር ፡ ከመ ፡ አነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And I will distinguish marvellously in that day the land of Gesem, on which my people dwell, in which the dog-fly shall not be: that thou mayest know that I am the Lord the God of all the earth.
translations.kjv: And the magicians did so with their enchantments to bring forth lice, but they could not: so there were lice upon man, and upon beast.

verses.geez: ወእፈልጥ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ሕዝብየ ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ ሕዝብከ ፡ ወጌሠመ ፡ ይከውን ፡ ዝነገር ።

translations.lxx: And I will put a difference between my people and thy people, and on the morrow shall this be on the land. And the Lord did thus.
translations.kjv: Then the magicians said unto Pharaoh, This is the finger of God: and Pharaoh’s heart was hardened, and he hearkened not unto them; as the LORD had said.

verses.geez:
ወገብረ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ወመጽአ ፡ ጽንጽያ ፡ ከልብ ፡ ወበዝኀ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አብያተ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወውስተ ፡ አብያተ
                  ፡ ዐበይቱ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወማሰነት ፡ ምድር ፡ እምጽንጽያ ፡ ከልብ ።

translations.lxx: And the dog-fly came in abundance into the houses of Pharao, and into the houses of his servants, and into all the land of Egypt; and the land was destroyed by the dog-fly.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Rise up early in the morning, and stand before Pharaoh; lo, he cometh forth to the water; and say unto him, Thus saith the LORD, Let my people go, that they may serve me.

verses.geez: ወጸውዖሙ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወለአሮን ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሑሩ ፡ ሡፁ ፡ ለአምላክክሙ ፡ በዛ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao called Moses and Aaron, saying, Go and sacrifice to the Lord your God in the land.
translations.kjv: Else, if thou wilt not let my people go, behold, I will send swarms of flies upon thee, and upon thy servants, and upon thy people, and into thy houses: and the houses of the Egyptians shall be full of swarms of flies, and also the ground whereon they are.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ኢይትከሀል ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይኩን ፡ እስመ ፡ ዘያሐርሙ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ንሠውዕ ፡ ለአምላክነ ፡ ወእመ ፡ ሦዕነ
                  ፡ ዘያሐርሙ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ በቅድሜሆሙ ፡ ይዌግሩነ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses said, It cannot be so, for we shall sacrifice to the Lord our God the abominations of the Egyptians; for if we sacrifice the abominations of the Egyptians before them, we shall be stoned.
translations.kjv: And I will sever in that day the land of Goshen, in which my people dwell, that no swarms of flies shall be there; to the end thou mayest know that I am the LORD in the midst of the earth.

verses.geez: ምሕዋረ ፡ ሠሉስ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ንሑር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሐቅል ፡ ወንሡዕ ፡ ለእግዚእ ፡ አምላክነ ፡ በከመ ፡ ይቤለነ ።

translations.lxx: We will go a journey of three days into the wilderness, and we will sacrifice to the Lord our God, as the Lord said to us.
translations.kjv: And I will put a division between my people and thy people: to morrow shall this sign be.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ አነ ፡ እፌንወክሙ ፡ ትሡዑ ፡ ለእግዚእ ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ በሐቅል ፡ ወባሕቱ ፡ ኢትትኤተቱ ፡ ወርኁቀ
                  ፡ ኢተሐውሩ ፡ ወጸልዩ ፡ እንከ ፡ ዲቤየ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚእ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao said, I will let you go, and do ye sacrifice to your God in the wilderness, but do not go very far away: pray then for me to the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the LORD did so; and there came a grievous swarm of flies into the house of Pharaoh, and into his servants’ houses, and into all the land of Egypt: the land was corrupted by reason of the swarm of flies.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ናሁ ፡ አነ ፡ እወጽእ ፡ እምኀቤከ ፡ ወእጼሊ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወይሴስል ፡ ጽንጽያ ፡ ከልብ ፡
                  እምፈርዖን ፡ ወእምዐበይቱ ፡ ጌሠመ ፡ ወኢትድግም ፡ እንከ ፡ አስተአብዶ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢትፈኑ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ይሡዑ ፡ ለእግዚእ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses said, I then will go forth from thee and pray to God, and the dog-fly shall depart both from thy servants, and from thy people to-morrow. Do not thou, Pharao, deceive again, so as not to send the people away to do sacrifice to the Lord.
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh called for Moses and for Aaron, and said, Go ye, sacrifice to your God in the land.

verses.geez: ወወፅአ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወጸለየ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And Moses went out from Pharao, and prayed to God.
translations.kjv: And Moses said, It is not meet so to do; for we shall sacrifice the abomination of the Egyptians to the LORD our God: lo, shall we sacrifice the abomination of the Egyptians before their eyes, and will they not stone us?

verses.geez:
ወገብረ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ በከመ ፡ ይቤ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወአሰሰለ ፡ ጽንጽያ ፡ ከልብ ፡ እምፈርዖን ፡ ወእምዐበይቱ ፡ ወእምሕዝቡ ፡
                  ወኢተርፈ ፡ ወኢአሐቲ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord did as Moses said, and removed the dog-fly from Pharao, and from his servants, and from his people, and there was not one left.
translations.kjv: We will go three days’ journey into the wilderness, and sacrifice to the LORD our God, as he shall command us.

verses.geez: ወአክበደ ፡ ልቦ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወበዝንቱሂ ፡ ጊዜ ፡ ወአበየ ፡ ፈንዎተ ፡ ሕዝቦ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao hardened his heart, even on this occasion, and he would not send the people away.
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh said, I will let you go, that ye may sacrifice to the LORD your God in the wilderness; only ye shall not go very far away: intreat for me.
